title: MirrorTrace Erasure-Request Ledger Input
description: Tracks YOUR OWN removal requests and their statutory deadlines. Tracking your own removals is a first-person action, so the scope enum intentionally omits consented/brand/safety_evidence and accepts only self/public_figure. This actor fetches nothing and analyses no third party; it only schedules check-backs for requests already drafted from your OWN findings, reusing the existing takedown planner.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Tracking your own removal requests is permitted ONLY for your own footprint (self) or a genuine public figure acting publicly. Other compliant scopes (consented/brand/safety_evidence) intentionally cannot run this actor.

findings_dataset_name.title: Findings dataset name
findings_dataset_name.description: Name of the Apify dataset holding the typed module_events produced by the other MirrorTrace actors. Records that are not valid module_events are ignored. Leave empty to pass findings inline via 'events'.

events.title: Inline findings (module_events)
events.description: Optional: pass module_event records directly (for offline/composed runs). Each must be a real module_event; anything else is dropped. No fake data is generated to fill gaps.

submitted_at.title: Real submission dates
submitted_at.description: Optional map of { "<host>|<request_kind>": "<ISO date you actually sent it>" }. When you supply a real submission date, the statutory respond-by deadline is computed from it. With no date the clock is honestly marked 'not started' — no deadline is invented.

broker_plan_store_name.title: Broker opt-out plan KV store
broker_plan_store_name.description: Optional. Name of a KV store holding a previously-produced broker_optout_plan, so its erasure letters fold into this ledger. Only a real broker_optout_plan with an erasure_plan is accepted; anything else is ignored.

broker_plan_key.title: Broker opt-out plan KV key
broker_plan_key.description: KV key for the broker_optout_plan record. Defaults to BROKER_OPTOUT_PLAN.

owned_hosts.title: Hosts you control
owned_hosts.description: Hostnames the subject controls (e.g. your-name.com). Findings on these become a self-remediation item rather than a third-party data-subject request.

subject_name.title: Your name (for the letters)
subject_name.description: Optional. Passed through to the reused takedown planner. Left blank, it becomes an explicit placeholder — never fabricated.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name). Used only for reporting and routed through the scope gate's free-text laundering scan.
